response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Handled lyrics synchronization flawlessly for 'Draw.'. Visual lyrics match the reference text. 2. JSON Usage: Full utilization of JSON for Scene 1 lyrics. Switched to manual transcription and translation for Scene 2's conversational/thank-you speech and Scene 3's on-screen handwritten notes. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed exactly to vocal chords activation and applied instant transitions where appropriate. Subtitled the silent outro card containing handwritten thank-you notes for readability.

subtitles.original: At last, hold my true colors
subtitles.english: At last, hold my true colors

subtitles.original: そっと、ずっと、重なって
I'm drawing out my true colors
subtitles.english: I'm drawing out my true colors
Painting with the colors I gathered
With the warmth of a dream
The smell of paint on my fingertips

subtitles.original: ありふれた朝の先には
Draw it slow, draw it true
subtitles.english: Draw it slow, draw it true

subtitles.original: I, I just wanted to say thank you...
subtitles.english: I, I just wanted to say thank you...

subtitles.original: so, so much for watching my first ever birthday live!
subtitles.english: so, so much for watching my first ever birthday live!

subtitles.original: I had so much fun, and I hope you, I hope you had so much fun too!
subtitles.english: I had so much fun, and I hope you, I hope you had so much fun too!

subtitles.original: I worked really, really hard, and I'm so happy right now, so...
subtitles.english: I worked really, really hard, and I'm so happy right now, so...

subtitles.original: thank you Chattini! Thank you everyone for watching!
subtitles.english: thank you Chattini! Thank you everyone for watching!

subtitles.original: 見てくれてありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for watching!

subtitles.original: So, I have to go now!
subtitles.english: So, I have to go now!

subtitles.original: And remember, big cat means... big trouble!
subtitles.english: And remember, big cat means... big trouble!

subtitles.original: Ciao everyone, I have one last message for you all!
subtitles.english: Ciao everyone, I have one last message for you all!

subtitles.original: Be sure to check out the MV premiere right after this!
subtitles.english: Be sure to check out the MV premiere right after this!

subtitles.original: And also, my new original song will be released on all streaming platforms on May 11th, midnight, in your local timezone.
subtitles.english: And also, my new original song will be released on all streaming platforms on May 11th, midnight, in your local timezone.

subtitles.original: Also, go check out my merch!
subtitles.english: Also, go check out my merch!

subtitles.original: [On-Screen Text]\nTHANK YOU to all my Chattini!\nFor all the love and support you have always given me!
subtitles.english: [On-Screen Text]\nTHANK YOU to all my Chattini!\nFor all the love and support you have always given me!

subtitles.original: [On-Screen Text]\nTHIS WAS MY VERY FIRST 3D BIRTHDAY LIVE!\nAnd I hope you all had as much fun as I did! RAOOO!
subtitles.english: [On-Screen Text]\nTHIS WAS MY VERY FIRST 3D BIRTHDAY LIVE!\nAnd I hope you all had as much fun as I did! RAOOO!
